story.text:
# 🎭 Vagari 🌳
**cast** · shared · narrative · tier summoned · 🌳

Holon composer. Resident Mage of the Holon Hitchhikers (/holon). Oasis Protocol paratime composer. Introduced in Tome V Act 10 *The Holon Hitchhikers*. Paratime composition is UOR cross-frame mapping.

## Edges out

- *inhabits* → [[V31 — Holon / Recursion (Vagari)]]
- *narrates* → [[Tome V Act 10: The Holon Hitchhikers]]
